summary: **Status:** analysis/survey only. Composed 2026-07-12 by a Fable research agent under the maintainer directive (2026-07-12): *"find existing benchmarks that have already been built by humans where possible"* — so that the two programme theses can be evaluated on openly-licensed, externally-authored gold instead of custom LLM-proxy-gold evals. This document changes no frozen record, issues no verdict, and states no feasibility conclusion; **CORRECTNESS and EFFICIENCY remain INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING**
title: Existing human-built benchmarks survey — escaping the LLM-proxy-gold trap
